issues.detail: Missing error handling for common failure scenarios.
Assumes Unix-like environment for bash scripts.
Model download script lacks checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Batch-transcribe podcast season to SRT on GPU
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chose faster-whisper with WhisperModel('large-v3', device='cuda', compute_type='float16') and beam_size=5 for accurate segment boundaries as the skill recommends; baseline used the slower original openai-whisper Python package without INT8/CTranslate2 optimization.

scenarios.name: German interview translated to English with speaker labels
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combined faster-whisper task='translate' with pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1 and merged segments by computing per-speaker overlap duration as documented; baseline transcribed in German first and did not use the documented diarization merge pattern.
